name: agent-trace-hub
description: Collect, normalize, audit, and render coding-agent traces in one portable format.
author: selimozten

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node scripts/fix-shebang.mjs && chmod +x dist/index.js
scripts.check: tsgo --noEmit && node --experimental-strip-types src/index.ts --help >/dev/null && node --experimental-strip-types src/index.ts init --help >/dev/null && node --experimental-strip-types src/index.ts collect --help >/dev/null && node --experimental-strip-types src/index.ts review --help >/dev/null && node --experimental-strip-types src/index.ts upload --help >/dev/null && node --experimental-strip-types src/index.ts reject --help >/dev/null && node --experimental-strip-types src/index.ts list --help >/dev/null && node --experimental-strip-types src/index.ts grep --help >/dev/null && node --experimental-strip-types src/index.ts sources --help >/dev/null && node --experimental-strip-types src/index.ts discover --help >/dev/null && node --experimental-strip-types src/index.ts ingest --help >/dev/null && node --experimental-strip-types src/index.ts normalize --help >/dev/null && node --experimental-strip-types src/index.ts normalize-dir --help >/dev/null && node --experimental-strip-types src/index.ts validate --help >/dev/null && node --experimental-strip-types src/index.ts validate-artifact --help >/dev/null && node --experimental-strip-types src/index.ts audit --help >/dev/null && node --experimental-strip-types src/index.ts approve --help >/dev/null && node --experimental-strip-types src/index.ts review-gate --help >/dev/null && node --experimental-strip-types src/index.ts render --help >/dev/null && node --experimental-strip-types src/index.ts enrich --help >/dev/null && node --experimental-strip-types src/index.ts release --help >/dev/null
